# Feature: AST upgrade (acorn call graph)

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-08 — seeded from issue #17 -->

## Intent

Replace regex-only import/call expansion with AST-based import and call resolution so cross-file facts reach route scopes and the VisuDevGraph mapper.

## Preconditions

- VisuDevGraph IR and fact mapper merged (#10–#16)
- Blueprint pipeline extracts `CodeFact[]` per file and builds route scopes via `collectRelatedFiles`

## Happy Path

- [x] AST extracts import bindings and resolved call targets as `ast-import` / `ast-call` facts
- [x] Cross-file facts from call targets attach to route scopes and feed `buildVisuDevGraphFromFacts`
- [x] `collectRelatedFiles` follows AST call targets, not only regex imports

## Edge Cases

- [x] Parse errors fall back to regex import graph (no pipeline failure)
- [x] Non-TS/JS files skip AST and keep regex facts only

## Regression

- [x] Existing regex fact extractors still emit api-route, db-write, validation facts
- [x] `npm run checks` and Deno blueprint tests pass

## Assumptions

- acorn + acorn-typescript in Deno (SWC deferred per design doc)

## Screenshots

| Step | Filename            |
| ---- | ------------------- |
| 1    | `01-happy-path.png` |

## Implementation Notes

- `ast-call-graph.ts`: acorn + acorn-typescript parser for import bindings and call targets
- `fact-extractors.ts`: merges regex + AST facts; pipeline builds file index before extraction
- `route-facts-index.ts`: `attachAstCallFacts` propagates callee-file facts into route scopes
- `call-graph.builder.ts`: BFS includes AST-resolved targets alongside regex imports
- Tests: `ast-call-graph.test.ts` (5 tests)
